classData.description: Lists a project's issues with optional state / label / assignee filters.
classData.name: LIST_ISSUES

classData.description: Resolves an issue iid to its opaque global id (gid://gitlab/Issue/...) — required as the noteableId for the createNote comment mutation.
classData.name: GET_ISSUE_GID

classData.description: Resolves a project's label names to their opaque global ids — required for the addLabelIds / removeLabelIds arguments of the updateIssue label mutation (GitLab's updateIssue mutates labels by id, not name).
classData.name: GET_PROJECT_LABEL_IDS
